programme.title: Martin: Go Tell It on the Martin
programme.desc: A distraught man with a bomb strapped to him takes over the station during Martin's show.

programme.title: Martin: 'Xpress Yourself
programme.desc: Gina regrets the changes she was hired to make in Martin's show when Martin changes too.

programme.title: Martin: Sophisticated Ladies
programme.desc: Gina and Pam's dreams of joining an exclusive women's club are jeopardized by Sheneneh.

programme.title: Martin: Ain't Nuttin' Goin' on But the Rent
programme.desc: Martin and the gang stick out the weather after his landlord cuts off the heat.

programme.title: Martin: The Ex-Files
programme.desc: Gina and Martin go out to dinner with their ex-lovers to see who would be more jealous.

programme.title: Martin: All the Players Came
programme.desc: Martin organizes a fundraiser to help save a failing theater in the neighborhood.

programme.title: Martin: Best and Bester
programme.desc: Tommy and Cole try to outdo each other in the hopes of being chosen as Martin's best man.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: PSAT Pstory
programme.desc: When Will scores higher than Carlton on an intelligence test, Carlton resorts to cheating.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Granny Gets Busy
programme.desc: Philip's widowed mother spends more time with the handyman when visiting Bel-Air.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Guess Who's Coming to Marry
programme.desc: The Banks' household is prepared for Aunt Janice's wedding, but not for her groom.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: The Big Four-Oh
programme.desc: Vivian becomes obsessed with achieving her lifelong dream of being a professional dancer.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: She Ain't Heavy
programme.desc: Will meets a girl whom he likes, but is ashamed to take her out because of her weight.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Cased Up
programme.desc: Philip defends Will when he is involved in a car accident with Hilary's boyfriend.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Hi-Ho Silver
programme.desc: Will and Carlton suspect the neighbours of stealing the family's heirloom silverware.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: The Butler Did It
programme.desc: Will and the children rent the house out to a production company for a music video shoot.

programme.title: Martin: Martin in the Corner Pocket
programme.desc: The honeymoon is over for Gina when Martin stays out one night, playing pool and getting hustled until he loses even the clothes off his back.

programme.title: Martin: Kill Him with Kindness
programme.desc: Martin thinks Gina wants to kill him for life insurance money.

programme.title: Martin: Blow, Baby, Blow
programme.desc: When music producer Biggie Smalls comes to town, everybody wants to be a star.

programme.title: Martin: Ring a Ding, Ding, Ding Gone
programme.desc: Martin takes off his wedding ring when his pals complain that it scares off women, but he's the frightened one when he has to explain its loss to Gina.

programme.title: Martin: Love T.K.O.
programme.desc: Martin and Gina's romantic weekend gets interrupted by everyone else's love woes.

programme.title: Martin: He Say, She Say
programme.desc: Cole meets a special woman with a big secret.

programme.title: Martin: Uptown Friday Night
programme.desc: After picking up Gina's earrings, Tommy, Cole and Jerome get robbed.

programme.title: Martin: Old School Loving
programme.desc: Gina gets too busy to take care of Martin.

programme.title: Martin: Cole on Ice
programme.desc: When Cole gets fired, Martin hires him.

programme.title: Martin: Housekeeper From Hell
programme.desc: Martin and Gina are afraid to terminate their tough new housekeeper.

programme.title: Movie: Love at First Dance
programme.desc: A woman is tasked with teaching Manhattan's former 'Most Eligible Bachelor' how to dance for his extravagant, society wedding. But as the dance lessons progress, complications ensue when feelings begin to develop between them.

programme.title: Movie: Love, Take Two
programme.desc: A woman moved to Los Angeles with dreams of becoming a writer. Years later, she's the producer of a reality show based around weddings. While filming on site, she runs into her ex-boyfriend, who is cast as the groom-to-be, and it sets her world on fire.

programme.title: Movie: Autumn Dreams
programme.desc: A young couple's spur of the moment marriage is immediately annulled by the bride's parents. Years later, they discover that a glitch in the paperwork means they are still husband and wife.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Miles to Go
programme.desc: The girls find out that Rose's boyfriend is in a witness protection program.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: There Goes the Bride
programme.desc: Dorothy has been sneaking around so that Sophia doesn't discover that she's been dating Stan. However, when Stan proposes, Dorothy must reveal the truth to Sophia.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: There Goes the Bride
programme.desc: Totally against Dorothy and Stan's impending nuptials, Sophia vows to not let the ceremony go off. Meanwhile, Blanche begins interviewing for a new roommate since Dorothy is planning to move out.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Older and Wiser
programme.desc: Wanting someone to watch after Sophia during the day, Dorothy gets Sophia a job under false pretenses. Meanwhile, Blanche and Rose are all excited about being hired as models for a Penny Saver.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Melodrama
programme.desc: Blanche wants to intensify her relationship with her infamous one-night-stand-man, Mel Bushman. Meanwhile, Rose tries her hand at TV reporting. Her assignment: a dog show.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Even Grandmas Get the Blues
programme.desc: While babysitting for her granddaughter, a man mistakes Blanche as being the baby's mother and Blanche does nothing to set him straight. Meanwhile, Sophia gets ready for the Festival of the Dancing Virgins.

programme.title: Frasier: To Tell the Truth
programme.desc: Niles expects the worst on the eve of his divorce proceedings and Frasier helps him out.

programme.title: Frasier: Decoys
programme.desc: A conniving Niles schemes to play matchmaker with Roz and her former attorney/ boyfriend.

programme.title: Frasier: The Dinner Party
programme.desc: Full of joie de vivre, a jaunty Frasier recruits Niles to plan a simple dinner party.

programme.title: Frasier: Taps at the Montana
programme.desc: The condo board tells Niles his lease will be cancelled due to a previous misadventure.

programme.title: Frasier: I.Q.
programme.desc: The sibling rivalry between Frasier and Niles comes to a head when they compare IQ scores.

programme.title: Frasier: Dr. Nora
programme.desc: Dr. Nora is hired to host a radio program and abuses her cowering call-in questioners.

programme.title: Frasier: When a Man Loves Two Women
programme.desc: Just as Frasier feels good about his present relationship, he meets another woman.

programme.title: Frasier: Visions of Daphne
programme.desc: Niles encourages Daphne to believe her psychic visions of a stranger becoming her husband.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Ricky Asks for a Raise
programme.desc: Things backfire when Lucy convinces Ricky that he should pressure his boss for a raise.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Job Switching
programme.desc: Lucy and Ethel get jobs in a candy factory, where the sweets come faster than expected.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: The Saxophone
programme.desc: Lucy represents herself as skilled saxophonist to join her husband on tour.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: The Anniversary Present
programme.desc: Lucy gets the wrong idea after Ricky asks a neighbour to help surprise her.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Witness
programme.desc: Rose has a new man, Carl, in her life but suddenly out of the blue Miles returns, still undercover in the Witness Protection Program.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: What a Difference a Date Makes
programme.desc: The man who stood Dorothy up for her senior prom contacts her and they make a date. After learning why he stood her up, Dorothy unleashes her wrath on the person at fault, Sophia.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Love for Sale
programme.desc: The girls prepare for the Children's Hospital Bachelorette Auction and a reluctant Dorothy decides to participate. She is in for a quick surprise when Stan walks in and begins bidding.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Never Yell Fire in a Crowded Retirement Home
programme.desc: The deathbed confession of an ex-patient at Shady Pines means bad news for Sophia, since in her confession she stated that she and Sophia started the 1985 Shady Pines fire.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Never Yell Fire in a Crowded Retirement Home
programme.desc: Sophia can't remember the events of the evening of the 1985 Shady Pines fire and decides to jump bail and go back to Sicily. With the threat of Sophia going to jail, the girls reminisce about good times they have spent together.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Henny Penny: Straight, No Chaser
programme.desc: The girls are quarantined with first-graders when they all catch the measles.

programme.title: Home and Family
programme.desc: Actress Kellie Pickler from the Hallmark original movie 'Wedding at Graceland' joins us in the kitchen to cook. Preppy Kitchen's John Kanell bakes an orange buttercream wedding cake. Plus, 'BARE' creator Leah Itsines prepares healthy chicken gyros.

programme.title: Movie: Rescuing Madison
programme.desc: A romance begins when a famous singer is rescued by a firefighter.

programme.title: Movie: Love in Paradise
programme.desc: A Western movie star is forced to spend a weekend doing PR at a dude ranch. When his fans learn he's terrified of horses, he sets out to prove to them that he really does have what it takes to be a rancher.

programme.title: Movie: October Kiss
programme.desc: Around Halloween, a woman is hired as temporary nanny by a widowed, work-obsessed executive. She reaches out to teach him and his two young children what is important in life, unconditional love.

programme.title: The Office: Casual Friday
programme.desc: Michael has to mediate a dispute within his new sales team. Meanwhile, trouble brews in the office when several employees take the term 'casual' Fridays too loosely.

programme.title: The Office: Cafe Disco
programme.desc: Michael gets into the café/ disco scene. Meanwhile, Pam and Jim decide to take a secret trip.

programme.title: The Office: Company Picnic
programme.desc: Michael and Holly are reunited at the annual Dunder Mifflin company picnic. Meanwhile, the office competes in the picnic's volleyball tournament.

programme.title: The Office: Gossip
programme.desc: Michael feels left out as the rest of the office gossips about the summer interns. While Michael searches for the next juicy rumour to share, Andy struggles with heterosexuality.

programme.title: The Office: The Meeting
programme.desc: Michael starts to feel insecure and defensive after a request from Jim. Dwight convinces Toby to look into Darryl's worker's comp claim. Pam tries to deal with the guest list of the wedding.

programme.title: The Office: The Promotion
programme.desc: David lets everyone know that not everyone will be getting a raise. Dwight finally hits his breaking point with Jim and looks around the office for support. Pam asks for cash instead of wedding gifts.

programme.title: The Office: Niagara
programme.desc: Everyone travels to Niagara Falls for Jim and Pam's wedding. The guys try to hook up while everyone tries to keep Pam's pregnancy a secret.

programme.title: The Office: Niagara
programme.desc: Pam deals with Andy's sensitive injury; Kevin loses his shoes on the day of the wedding.

programme.title: The Office: Mafia
programme.desc: An insurance salesman meets with Michael and Dwight and Andy convince him that the salesman is part of the mafia. Pam's painting is accidentally ruined by Erin.

programme.title: The Office: The Lover
programme.desc: Michael reveals the identity of the woman he is dating to Jim and Pam. Dwight apologizes to Jim for tormenting him over the years with an odd peace offering.

programme.title: The Office: Koi Pond
programme.desc: The office plans a haunted house for the children of the community. Michael falls into a koi pond while at an important meeting. Pam and Andy try cold calling for more sales.

programme.title: The Office: Double Date
programme.desc: Jim and Pam have no choice but to go out with Michael and Helene, as their excuses have dried up. Dwight does nice things for the people in the office.

programme.title: The Office: Murder
programme.desc: Michael is troubled by rumours about Dunder Mifflin, and forces the office into a day of strange diversions. Andy figures out that the chief obstacle he has to overcome is his own awkwardness.

programme.title: The Office: Share Holders Meeting
programme.desc: When Michael learns he is going to be honoured at the Dunder Mifflin shareholder meeting in New York City, he brings Andy, Dwight and Oscar with him. Jim is left in charge of the office, and has a hard time getting Ryan to do any work.

programme.title: South Park: Toilet Paper
programme.desc: Cartman convinces the boys to toilet paper their teacher's house. But when Kyle is overwhelmed with guilt for the horrendous prank, Cartman tries to kill him.

programme.title: South Park: Cartman Joins NAMBLA
programme.desc: Cartman suddenly finds Stan, Kenny and Kyle too immature to be his friends. He then decides to seek friendship using the Internet, where he finds an older man who is more than willing to be his 'friend.'

programme.title: South Park: The Wacky Molestation Adventure
programme.desc: To get back at his parents for not letting him go to a concert, Kyle tells the police that his parents molested him. Soon, the whole town is free of adults and divided into two rival factions.

programme.title: South Park: Fun With Veal
programme.desc: Stan is appalled when he realizes the veal he's been eating is, in fact, the meat from little baby calves. He goes to great lengths to rescue calves from the slaughterhouse, and a standoff with the Park County Police Department ensues.

programme.title: South Park: Something You Can Do With Your Finger
programme.desc: Stan, Kyle, Kenny and Cartman form their own boy band, 'Fingerbang,' and search for a fifth member. It is also Carman's latest scheme to make a million dollars.

programme.title: South Park: Quintuplets 2000
programme.desc: Eight-year-old contorting quintuplets from Romania defect to the United States and seek shelter with Stan's family.

programme.title: South Park: The Red Badge of Gayness
programme.desc: Cartman has visions of glory as he suits up for the Confederacy in the annual re-enactment of a Civil War battle, and leads the drunken rebels to defeat the union. When they aren't satisfied with just the town, they move to take back the entire country.

programme.title: South Park: Chef Aid
programme.desc: A record company steals Chef's song 'Stinky Britches' and he sues them for the rights. When Johnny Cochrane defends the record company, Chef is left penniless. But he has some very famous and talented friends who want to help their old mentor.

programme.title: South Park: Chickenlover
programme.desc: During a crime spree, Barbrady is forced to admit he can't read and must return to school. Anarchy ensues when the town realizes they are without law enforcement, so Barbrady makes the boys deputies to help keep the peace.

programme.title: South Park: Wing
programme.desc: The boys set up the 'Awesome Talent Agency' and pool all their resources to impress their first client only to have an agency run by the Chinese Mafia steal her away.

programme.desc: Carrie decides to go back to college after lawyers from work look down on her.

programme.desc: Doug goes against Carrie's advice and buys himself a new car.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Strike Too
programme.desc: Stephanie helps Doug get a job as the school's substitute social studies teacher.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Strike Out
programme.desc: While the IPS strike continues, Carrie and Kelly worry about their husbands' sanity.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Dark Meet
programme.desc: Doug and Carrie recall Thanksgiving Day 1993, when Doug first met Carrie's family.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Twisted Sitters
programme.desc: Doug and Carrie are caught in an embarrassing situation while babysitting for the Palmers.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Work Related
programme.desc: Doug and Deacon keep raising the stakes in an effort to play the best practical joke.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Better Camera
programme.desc: Doug surprises Carrie with a new camera for Christmas, and Arthur writes a script.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Wedding Presence
programme.desc: Doug and Carrie try to come up with a way out of attending their friend's wedding.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Hi-Def Jam
programme.desc: Doug and Deacon will stop at nothing to watch the Super Bowl on HDTV.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Paint Misbehavin
programme.desc: Deacon has a paintball birthday party; Carrie tells Doug she finds Deacon attractive.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Deacon Blues
programme.desc: Doug is surprised to find his married best friend, Deacon, out with another woman.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Horizontal Hold
programme.desc: Carrie and Doug ban sex for two weeks, forcing them to resolve their conflicts verbally.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Inner Tube
programme.desc: Doug's guilty conscience leads to a spoof in which he appears on a number of TV shows.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Papa Pill
programme.desc: Doug takes his turn as Arthur's caretaker and finds it a challenging and difficult task.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Package Deal
programme.desc: Doug quits his job to work for a competitor and Carrie develops a tanning cream addiction.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Catch 22
programme.desc: When a woman is shot to death in her driveway, police suspect a younger co-worker whose advances she spurned of killing her.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Cinderella Story
programme.desc: A woman is found sexually assaulted and stabbed to death on a beach, a mere 10 yards from her hotel. Police use the tennis shoes left at the scene of the crime to find her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Prints Among Thieves
programme.desc: An eccentric millionaire who flaunted his wealth is found murdered.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Unholy Alliance
programme.desc: Police fear a missing woman is the latest victim in a string of similar crimes.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Signed, Sealed and Delivered
programme.desc: When a bomb explodes in a home, police believe it was an act of revenge.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cop Out
programme.desc: A college student is found dead and the evidence suggests he knew his killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Small Town Terror
programme.desc: Three bombings within a two-mile area were more than a coincidence, but no one claimed responsibility and no one in particular was targeted.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fresh Heir
programme.desc: In the 20 years following an unsolved murder, lives changed and so did forensic science. In time, a high-powered microscope and DNA profiling revealed a clue no one had seen before.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Message in a Bottle
programme.desc: When an attractive young Missouri woman is found dead in her apartment, police meticulously generate a suspect list a mile long. The culprit turns out to be the most unlikely suspect with an insatiable lust for power and control.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sharper Image
programme.desc: After a girl was killed, investigators learn that cutting-edge technologies from NASA prove that the arrested suspect was not the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Political Thriller
programme.desc: When a Nevada politician dies in the midst of a cutthroat re-election campaign, the only clue investigators have to go on are the tiny punctures on her skin. As they dig deeper, they hone in upon the deceased's husband, a critical care nurse.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Double Cross
programme.desc: A naval officer is found brutally murdered after threatening to report harassment.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Calculated Coincidence
programme.desc: There is little evidence at the crime scene until investigators discover a link between their prime suspect and an unsolved murder committed six years earlier in a different state.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sworded Scheme
programme.desc: A college student goes missing, and investigators discover blood spatter in her boyfriend’s bedroom. Blood spatter someone has gone to great lengths to conceal.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: The Hit That Wasn't
programme.desc: In Philadelphia, the brazen killing of a state's witness leads police to an alleged hitman but the evidence against him could be nothing more than smoke and mirrors.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Water Hazard
programme.desc: The victim had ingested a massive amount of cyanide. An unlikely clue, a flaw on a mailing envelope, exposed a murderer who was willing to kill innocent people to get the one person he wanted.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shell Game
programme.desc: A tiny clue, no bigger than a thumbtack, held all the information investigators needed to put a trio of cold-blooded killers behind bars.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sole Survivor
programme.desc: A college student vanished without a trace, and dirt on a pair of shoes reveals the extent of one man's deception.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Insignificant Others
programme.desc: A man's wife had taken her own life, and his college sweetheart had killed herself in much the same fashion fourteen years earlier. Investigators had to determine if this was a coincidence or an attempt to get away with murder twice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Catch 22
programme.desc: When a woman is shot to death in her driveway, police suspect a younger co-worker whose advances she spurned of killing her.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Cinderella Story

programme.desc: An eccentric millionaire who flaunted his wealth is found murdered.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Unholy Alliance
programme.desc: Police fear a missing woman is the latest victim in a string of similar crimes.

programme.title: Crimes of the Century: Amanda Knox
programme.desc: In 2007, Amanda Knox, an American exchange student living in Italy, was arrested and tried for the murder of her roommate. The evidence was shockingly graphic, but the DNA was inconclusive. A look at the case and where things stand today.

programme.title: Crimes of the Century: Andrea Yates
programme.desc: In 2001, Andrea Yates drowned her five small children in the bathtub of their Houston home. Her bizarre explanation was that she did it to save her children from Satan.

programme.title: Crimes of the Century: D.C. Snipers
programme.desc: In 2002, a sniper terrorizes Washington D.C. and the surrounding suburbs, randomly targeting ordinary citizens. Ten are killed, three wounded.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Grave Danger
programme.desc: A young man dies in a mysterious car crash, but was it an accident? Forensic science uncovered what really caused the crash, and the truth devastated three different families.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Internal Affair
programme.desc: Friends and family of a woman gone missing were determined to find her until their worst fears were confirmed weeks later. Blood evidence and computer forensics helped investigators to catch the killer, and convince the jury of his guilt.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Case of the Flue
programme.desc: In 1993, when an 83 year old woman was found dead in her home, investigators used clues like flecks of paint, t-shirt fibres, and a cellular phone to work out just how, and why, she died.

programme.title: Forensic Files: No Safe Place
programme.desc: A wealthy man is gunned down outside his Louisiana home. His wife tells a tale of three masked men emerging from the shadows, but she may know more than she's saying.

programme.title: Forensic Files: About Face
programme.desc: A skeleton is found on an abandoned plot of land, but before investigators can figure out who killed her, they have to figure out who she is.

programme.title: Forensic Files: In the Bag
programme.desc: A little boy is found alone and in a panic. When police go to his home, they find his grandparents dead in their bedroom.

programme.title: All on the Line: Mommy Can't Help You Out Here
programme.desc: To keep their family businesses afloat, two Gloucester fishing boats band together in their hunt for giant bluefin tuna, battling the rough North Atlantic to land fish that could be worth upwards of $20,000.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Double Agent
programme.desc: The Cornelia Marie uses U.S. satellites to spy on the Russians, Scott pioneers a dormant fishery and Wild Bill faces off with a Russian greenhorn.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: On Deck: The Bleeding Edge
programme.desc: Crawling with facts and bonus scenes: Johnathan finds himself going under the knife at sea as King season comes to an end. Junior chases the elusive Golden King and Wild Bill faces off with a greenhorn.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: The Russian Front
programme.desc: Junior risks crossing into Russian waters to tank golden crab. Co-captains Jake and Johnathan attempt an alliance with long-time rival Keith Colburn. Josh Harris bets his season on instinct. Short on quota and options, Wild Bill seeks work in Russia.

programme.title: NASA and SpaceX: Countdown to Launch
programme.desc: Elon Musk and the greatest minds from SpaceX and NASA are on the verge of making space history. Behind-the-scenes access reveals how these pioneers dream up and test new technology that will make trips to the moon, Mars and beyond commonplace.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: The Russian Front
programme.desc: Junior risks crossing into Russian waters to tank golden crab. Co-captains Jake and Johnathan attempt an alliance with long-time rival Keith Colburn. Josh Harris bets his season on instinct. Short on quota and options, Wild Bill seeks work in Russia.

programme.title: NASA and SpaceX: Countdown to Launch

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Global Game Show
programme.desc: Josh takes a turn as a game show host. He visits some of the most beautiful locations on early and quizzes tourists and locals with trivia. Plus, there are highlights and never-before-seen footage from his recent investigations.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Global Game Show: American Legends
programme.desc: Josh Gates travels across the USA, giving contestants a chance to win up to $500 as they test their knowledge about the country's greatest explorers and most notorious outlaws.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Yamashita's Gold
programme.desc: Josh heads to the Philippines, searching for gold hidden by Japan in WWII.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Cloning the Woolly Mammoth
programme.desc: To help clone the extinct woolly mammoth back to life, Josh Gates visits the Korean biotech lab driving the project and excavates ancient bones in a working Canadian gold mine. He then descends into a vast sinkhole in Siberia to unearth frozen DNA.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Journey to the Ice Age
programme.desc: To find a viable sample of mammoth DNA, Josh Gates retrieves bone samples from the massive Batagay Crater. He then journeys far upriver to a site in the lawless Siberian wilderness where tusk hunters carve out troves of bones from the permafrost.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: City of Gold
programme.desc: Josh treks the stone-paved Inca Trail, ascending 20,000 feet through the Andes and into the Peruvian Amazon in search of the undiscovered City of Gold. His road to riches takes a detour to the legendary ruins of Machu Picchu.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Hunt for the Ruby Slippers
programme.desc: Josh investigates the theft of the ruby slippers worn by Judy Garland in the 1939 classic movie, The Wizard of Oz.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Samurai Sword of Power
programme.desc: Josh explores ancient shrines hidden in the mountains and underground tunnels across Japan in search for the missing mystical Honjo sword. Along the way, Josh learns the ways of the samurai and forges his own samurai sword.

programme.title: NASA and SpaceX: Countdown to Launch
programme.desc: Elon Musk and the greatest minds from SpaceX and NASA are on the verge of making space history. Behind-the-scenes access reveals how these pioneers dream up and test new technology that will make trips to the moon, Mars and beyond commonplace.

programme.title: Space Launch LIVE: America Returns to Space

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Pups Save the Circus/ Pup a Doodle Do

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Pups Save a Bat Family/ Pups Save a Mud Monster

programme.title: Bubble Guppies: Humunga-Truck!

programme.title: Bubble Guppies: Come to Your Senses!

programme.title: Blue's Clues & You: Playdate With Magenta!

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Pups Save Ace's Birthday Surprise/ Pups Save a Tower of Pizza

programme.desc: The Ladybird is back and Chickaletta has super powers. The Mighty Twins join the Mighty Pups to save a giant chicken and the town.The Mighty Pups have to stop Harold Humdinger before he puts Adventure Bay in a deep freeze so he can become mayor.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Pups Rescue a Rescuer/ Pups Save the Phantom of the Frog Po
programme.desc: Mayor Goodway tries to help the PAW Patrol rescue Danny. A spooky sound forces frogs from their home.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Pups Save a School Bus/ Pups Save the Songbirds
programme.desc: When the famous singing songbirds of Adventure Bay go missing, it's PAW Patrol to the rescue.

programme.title: Ollie's Pack: Hollie Monitor/ Sister Save Me

programme.title: The First 48: Southwick/ Devil's Doorway
programme.desc: Louisville detectives discover their murder victims have matching tattoos and that a missing friend of the deceased may be a third victim. A man is gunned down in a doorway, and the suspects claim it was self-defence.

programme.title: The First 48: Blood Alley/ Bad Deal

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Elevating the Game
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q hop behind the register at a burger joint and then head to a department store where they have only themselves to blame. And tonight's big loser gets into a rigged elevator only to find his own worst nightmare.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Deal With the Devils
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr invade a silent library to see who can make the most noise without getting into trouble. Plus, they search for their missing wives at the mall, and tonight's two losers get iced out by the New Jersey Devils.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Ash Clown
programme.desc: The guys give customers an eye opening experience at a glasses store, and convince customers to pass illicit, and ridiculous, messages while shopping for groceres.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Spider Man
programme.desc: The guys give all-you-can-eat buffet customers all they can handle, and turn into real power tools while teaching workshops at a hardware store. Then, tonight's big loser suffers a punishment that will make your skin crawl.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Stage Fright
programme.desc: The guys serve up raw deals at a pawn shop counter and try to convince strangers to give them hugs. Plus, tonight's loser performs his life story through song.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Lady and the Tramp
programme.desc: The guys us a two-way mirror to get each other to crack, and tonight's loser gets taken for a ride that ends at the Statue of Liberty.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q pull desk duty, and then do strangers a solid by barring them from the bathroom. Plus, the big loser learns the hard way that gratuity is not included.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Blue Man Dupe
programme.desc: Murr, Joe, Q and Sal are a little too generous with fellow shoppers at the market, then ask strangers to help them out of a texting jam. Plus, the big loser fights his way, repeatedly, to the best seat in the house.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Dumbbell
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr test their parental instincts by reading their daughters' diaries, then give presentations that are anything but normal. Later, tonight's big loser gets painfully honest with bodybuilders at the gym.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Eggman
programme.desc: Joe, Q, Sal and Murr go incognito to fool unsuspecting strangers, then pop in for a coffee just in time to miss out on a big prize. Plus, tonight's big loser might just crack under the pressure of his rotten punishment.

programme.title: Tirdy Works: Greener Pastures
programme.desc: Mary taps into her previous experience as a biologist to help Tirdy Works financially. Plus, in Pittsfield, she hatches a plan to save a community theater.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Cake Loss
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Murr and Joe mean no disrespect to patrons at a food court, then cut to the chase while posing as tailors. Later, strangers pick sides in a wild debate, and tonight's big loser takes the cake with his crumby punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Antisocial Network
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q play matchmakers at the food court, then switch fields to pose as architects, sharing some perplexing new building technology. Plus, tonight's big loser makes a connection while networking, and won't let go.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Off the Reservation
programme.desc: Murr, Q, Joe and Sal participate in a fake documentary, then find themselves in the middle of a marshmallow throwing contest. Plus, tonight's big loser is the host with the least when he can't find customers' dinner reservations.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Washed Up

programme.title: Public Affairs Events
programme.desc: Public affairs events, congressional hearings, speeches, and interviews.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Great Kris
programme.desc: Follow the one-of-a-kind family as well as their group of celebrity pals.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Family First
programme.desc: The girls recreate a legendary family video as part of Kris's epic 60th birthday bash. Meanwhile Khloé struggles to find a balance between supporting Lamar and returning to her daily life. Kendall worries that her family will get in the way of her dreams.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Todd Goes Country
programme.desc: While Todd works on a special song for Julie's birthday, he tricks her into planning her own surprise party. But when Julie threatens to cancel Todd's is forced to ask Savannah for help.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Hawaii Love You So
programme.desc: Against Julie's wishes, Todd brings the family on their 20th anniversary trip to Hawaii. When Savannah and Lindsie are charged with watching Nanny Faye, they get more than they bargained for.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Don't Kale Yourself
programme.desc: Lindsie challenges Todd and Julie to change their unhealthy habits. When Chase gets his wisdom teeth removed, Todd takes advantage of his altered state of mind.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Todd's Not Dead
programme.desc: Todd faces up to his own mortality by making the entire family plan his funeral. Savannah drops the ball on her pageant queen duties, and has to get her hands dirty by working in a dog shelter.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Colon All Cards
programme.desc: Todd sets an appointment for Julie's colonoscopy but runs into trouble when she forces him to get one too. Faye's gambling gets out of hand, and Lindsie takes drastic measures to get her to quit.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: You Can't Handle the Truce
programme.desc: Lindsie sets up a lunch for Todd and Will so they can work out their differences. Meanwhile Savannah gives Grayson dating advice.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Review and Renew
programme.desc: Todd appoints himself director when he and the kids film a commercial for the Juice Bar. Meanwhile, Julie and Lea look into a new rejuvenation procedure.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Go Flip Yourself
programme.desc: Todd is forced to the rescue when Chase and Parker take on a house-flipping project. Then, when Todd's childhood friend and prankster-in-crime Bill comes to visit, Julie seeks solace with Savannah.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Message in a Bottle Rocket
programme.desc: Todd takes the family to a rustic resort for Independence Day, but gets mocked for his outdoor skills. Meanwhile, Chase and Parker become the source of major fireworks.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Crowning Around
programme.desc: The family visits Las Vegas to support Savannah in the Miss Teen USA Beauty Pageant. While there, Chase has to keep tabs on Nanny Faye's gambling addiction.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Pretty in Print
programme.desc: Todd and Savannah are both chosen to be part of a magazine's '25 Most Beautiful People of Nashville' issue. Meanwhile, Julie helps Chase prep for his real estate exam.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Don't Ask, Don't Tell
programme.desc: On the eve of her wedding, Charlotte admits that she and Trey have not slept together.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Escape From New York
programme.desc: While visiting L.A., Samantha meets a model and Carrie meets Matthew McConaughey.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Sex and Another City
programme.desc: While in Los Angeles, the girls head to the Playboy Mansion for a pool party.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Hot Child in the City
programme.desc: Charlotte tackles Trey's problem, while Samantha throws a party for a mature 13-year-old.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Frenemies
programme.desc: Miranda is shocked to learn that her date has died; Carrie teaches a seminar.

programme.title: Sex and the City: What Goes Around Comes Around
programme.desc: Carrie apologizes to Natasha, and Charlotte encounters a gardener at the McDougal estate.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Cock a Doodle Do!
programme.desc: When Big invites Carrie to lunch, she ignores Miranda's advice and accepts his invitation.

programme.title: Sex and the City: The Agony and the Ex-Tacy
programme.desc: Carrie is left alone at a restaurant on her birthday and ponders the idea of soulmates.

programme.title: Sex and the City: The Real Me
programme.desc: Carrie is asked to join a fashion show that features both models and 'real people.'

programme.title: Sex and the City: Defining Moments
programme.desc: Carrie meets a jazzman to help her get over Big; Samantha crosses some boundaries.

programme.title: Sex and the City: What's Sex Got to Do With It?
programme.desc: Samantha actually begins to date someone that she likes; Miranda opts for celibacy.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Doggy Blu's
programme.desc: Khloé wonders if she's being too hard on Kris. Meanwhile, Kendall and Kris battle over Kendall's dog, and Scott surprises Kourtney with his new mobile office.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Vienna Incidents
programme.desc: A trip to Vienna proves to be an eye opening experience for Kim and Kris as they encounter some shocking racist remarks. Meanwhile, Kourtney finds excuses to stall moving into her new home.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Playing Dirty
programme.desc: Kris encourages Kourtney to shut down Scott's lavish plans for their new backyard. Things get down and dirty for Kim & Khloé when they find themselves in a mud wrestling match.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Move It or Lose It
programme.desc: Khloé struggles with moving out of her house and things get complicated when some of Lamar's jewelry is stolen. Bruce attempts to bond with Brody, but learns that his approach still needs some practice.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: A Thailand Vacation Part One
programme.desc: The family vacation to Thailand gets off to a bumpy start when Kourtney, Scott, and Rob decide not to come, and Kris and Bruce are fighting even before the family takes off.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: A Thailand Vacation Part Two
programme.desc: The family vacation continues to go south when the family discovers that Kendall and Kylie have run off and disappeared in Thailand. Meanwhile, Khloé begins to crumble under the pressure of feeling that everyone expects her to be Rob's keeper.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: A Thailand Vacation Part Three
programme.desc: When the family visits an orphanage in Thailand, Kim builds a connection with a young girl and struggles to find ways to enrich and better her life. Meanwhile, Brody and Brandon try to cheer up Khloé and find her a vacation fling.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Design for Disaster
programme.desc: When Khloé feels overwhelmed about decorating her house, Kourtney offers her services but fails to inform her sister that she comes at a high price. Plus, Kris helps her mom alleviate her fear of medical marijuana, but Bruce grows livid when he finds out.

programme.title: The Daily Pop
programme.desc: Jameela Jamil joins us for some real talk about body image and her legendary new role.

programme.title: Botched: Dr. Nassif Saved My Life
programme.desc: After saving Luci's life, Paul is given the go-ahead to finally fix her nose. Terry repairs a DJ's oversized hest and the doctors meet a woman with anxiety issues and help her find a solution for her terrible Tijuana procedures.

programme.title: Botched: Boner-free Zone
programme.desc: Dr. Dubrow transforms a woman's 'boner-free zone.' Dr. Nassif fixes the nose of a woman who had her dentist perform her rhinoplasty, and the doctors meet a mother who had extensive plastic surgery to look exactly like her daughter.

programme.title: Botched: Double Trouble
programme.desc: Paul follows a hunch and orders more tests for a woman with a severely botched nose and discovers shocking news. The doctors work in tandem to get two 'botched bunnies' back in centerfold shape.

programme.title: Botched: Breast Greedy
programme.desc: Dr. Nassif performs a rhinoplasty on a woman who had her first nose job at 12 years old. Dr. Dubrow works on a patient who wants to retire her Baywatch boobs and the doctors are left speechless by a patient who can only be described as 'unique.'

programme.title: Chopped: Summer Heat
programme.desc: For this heated summer battle, the chefs must work with seasonal foods like lobsters and cocktails in the first round. In the second basket, the chefs find another seafood mystery ingredient and potato chips.

programme.title: Chopped: Bacon, Burgers and Beer
programme.desc: In what may be the best Chopped competition theme ever, the chefs' baskets are packed with bacon, burgers and beer. In the bacon appetizer round, the competitors go in some inventive directions with their dishes.

programme.title: Chopped: Clambake Stakes
programme.desc: The chefs set out to make an unforgettable summer feast after learning each challenge will have a clambake theme. The entree basket includes a strange starch and plenty of gifts from the sea. Those in the final round work with a juicy fruit.

programme.title: Chopped: Lighten Up!
programme.desc: Four chefs who specialize in cooking lighter, healthier fare are challenged to make delicious, lean dishes in the Chopped kitchen. Low-calorie chips and some leafy greens inspire creativity in the first round.

programme.title: Chopped: High on the Hog
programme.desc: Nose-to-tail cannot fail! The competing chefs are elated to get a pork theme for their battle, and the gorgeous cuts of premium meat in the first basket don't disappoint. A Bloody Mary with a special surprise adds to the porky fun in the second round.

programme.title: Supermarket Stakeout: Trouble in Triple Decker
programme.desc: Four chefs are handing out cash to shoppers in Glendale, CA as they compete to make the best barbecue dish. Then the chefs are seeing triple as they cook up a tasty triple decker.

programme.title: Supermarket Stakeout: Luck Be a Shopper
programme.desc: Lady Luck pounds the pavement at Smith's in Las Vegas, Nev., as the chefs stakeout shoppers for a true parking lot tailgate. Love is in the air for a candlelit dinner, stakeout-style, before the final two chefs lead with fruit for dessert.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Hay There!
programme.desc: The family is hauling hay in high summer, so Ree Drummond's taking them cool refreshing strawberry cherry lemon limeade and awesome orange bars and demonstrates a slow cooker lasagne and marinated tomatoes.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Merc Story
programme.desc: Ree's opened her store, The Mercantile, and she's sharing the epic tale of opening day while making three get-ahead dinners. There's family favorite butternut mac and cheese, then Tuscan bean soup. Next, she cooks up ready to go chili packets.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Make It Easy
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is making things easy with four great recipes. First, there's easy queso to go with pork carnitas that have a shortened cooking time thanks to a multicooker. A humble sheet of foil is the secret to awesome brown sugar ribs.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Fixin' Fence, Fixin' Lunch
programme.desc: Ree fixes up Ladd and Tim's favorite Tex-Mex lunch. There's grilled steak packed into hearty Rib Eye quesadillas, spicy perfect pinto beans and a taco ranch side salad.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Osage Cowboy's Lunch
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is making a classic cowboy lunch for her husband, Ladd, and the other cowboys. She starts with a cheeseburger meatloaf that's everything they love about two favorite foods in one dish.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Home Sweet Home 1
programme.desc: Ree and the kids shoot a fun show with lots of hijinks and an Italian vibe. They make orecchiette with sausage and kale for past pronto and luscious leftovers star in a crazy mashup of pepperoni fried rice.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Double Dinners
programme.desc: Ree Drummond has a half-empty nest while her daughters are off at college, but she still needs good, hearty food at her fingertips for her hungry teenage sons. So she's cooking up dishes that she can serve half now and freeze the rest for another time.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Food Wheel Free-For-All
programme.desc: The chefs are taking a big spin around the market with three rounds of Food Wheel games! First, chefs spin the budget wheel to win a paltry $9.04 for their pork dish.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: All-Star Burgers
programme.desc: The only thing better than a burger is a burger made by one of Flavortown's all-star chefs. Guy Fieri brings together four chefs to test their burger-making prowess in a patty-for-patty throwdown.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Cheat Day
programme.desc: Guy Fieri invites four chefs to participate in Flavortown's first Cheat Day, challenging them to make dishes worth splurging on after a week of eating three square meals and exercising every day.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: World Fusion
programme.desc: Guy brings in chefs representing cuisines from all around the world to team up and fuse their cultures' flavours together. The teams create their best spicy dish to see which combination of cultures is the tastiest.

programme.title: Finding Bigfoot: Paranormal Squatchtivity
programme.desc: The team heads to the eerie forests of Pennsylvania that could be home to both Sasquatch and specters.

programme.title: Finding Bigfoot: Atomic Bigfoot
programme.desc: The team is in eastern Tennessee, where they've had success in the past. But they quickly discover the area is shrouded in mystery. Their cumulative research all points to one squatchy spot.

programme.title: Finding Bigfoot: A Squatch in the Ozarks
programme.desc: The team delves into the Ozark hollows in search of Sasquatch, colloquially known as the Blue Man. A packed town hall verifies that Bigfoots have been here for generations and an eventful final night has them convinced the Ozarks are the real deal.

programme.title: Finding Bigfoot: Amazon Squatchin'
programme.desc: The team travels to the Amazon River basin in search of the mythical Mapinguari. With one eye and a gaping mouth on its stomach, the team does not give into the myth, convinced it's yet another undiscovered primate, and set out to find it in the jungle.

programme.title: Finding Bigfoot: The Squatchland
programme.desc: The team travels to Iowa to investigate Yellow River State Forest's history of reports. The local BFRO share stories around the campfire, and the team explores the park, leading to an epic final night, and a squatch on therm.

programme.title: Finding Bigfoot: The 100th Episode
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes in the search for America's favorite monster. Spanning over 9 years and 100 episodes, this special hour with the cast and the crew of Finding Bigfoot shows off never seen before footage and highlights the best of Bigfoot.

programme.title: Finding Bigfoot: Further Evidence: Biggest Search Yet
programme.desc: Find out what the team thinks as they head to the Four Corners, where Arizona, Colorado, New Mexico and Utah meet in an unusually squatchy area.

programme.title: Finding Bigfoot: Buckeye Bigfoot
programme.desc: The team travels to Ohio to investigate an alleged close encounter with a bigfoot caught on tape.

programme.title: Finding Bigfoot: Bobo Marks His Turf
programme.desc: The team is investigating a thermal image video of a possible bigfoot.

programme.title: Finding Bigfoot: The Sierra Spy
programme.desc: The team heads to the Sierras to investigate multiple sasquatch reports.

programme.title: Finding Bigfoot: CSI Bigfoot
programme.desc: The crew travels to Oklahoma to investigate evidence that could be bigfoot DNA.

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Captured on Camera
programme.desc: Steve and Terri catch and relocate an entire zoo full of animals left to the mercy of a failed business operation. With the help of their key staff from Australia Zoo, they catch birds, kangaroos, koalas, snakes and crocodiles.

programme.title: Too Cute!: Kittens and Canines
programme.desc: A litter of orphaned kittens trail a pair of Dandy Dinmont Terriers. The only girl in a litter of four American Bobtails hunts for her place in the pack. Finally, a naughty Tonkinese kitten proves a handful for her prim and proper mom.

programme.title: Dogs 101: Australian Cattle Dog, Saluki, Norwich Terrier, Boykin Spaniel, Wonder Dog
programme.desc: Meet the Australian Cattle Dog, Saluki, Norwich Terrier, Boykin Spaniel, Wonder Dog, Bull Terrier, and Cardigan Welsh Corgi.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Never Too Old for a Treehouse

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Antonio Brown's Steel City Skybox
programme.desc: Pete makes a treehouse touchdown in Pittsburgh for Antonio Brown, wide receiver for the Steelers. The game plan is to build a luxury skybox with a two-storey window wall that overlooks a custom basketball court and football field.

programme.title: Tanked!: Fermenting Donuts
programme.desc: Wayde and Brett dive into a brand new undertaking transporting a fully operational beer fermenter. The guys head south to create an iconic donut-shaped tank inspired by the renowned Dunkin' Donuts.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: New Arrival
programme.desc: The zoo's Asian elephant family welcome a new arrival. Grumpy matriarch Thi has been pregnant for two years and is reaching the end of her tether. It's Thi's fourth baby and after giving birth to a stillborn, the zoo is keeping a close eye on her.

programme.title: The Zoo: The Kings of Queens

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Curse of Superstition Mountains
programme.desc: New discoveries at the site of an alleged long-lost gold mine could lead investigators to a 200-million-dollar payday, and using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate clues in long-lost maps and relics to recover the Lost Dutchman's treasure.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Knights Templar in America
programme.desc: Mysterious new evidence suggests the Knights Templar fled Europe and rebuilt their fearsome warrior order in the Americas a century before Columbus, and experts use cutting-edge tech to investigate if long-lost relics confirm this game-changing theory.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Finding the Fountain of Youth
programme.desc: The legend of the Fountain of Youth might finally be explained by hidden messages encoded in a 500-year-old map, and using cutting-edge archaeological methods, experts explore forgotten caves and perilous waters to reveal this mystery's long-lost secrets.

programme.title: Unearthed: Alien Relics of the Ancients
programme.desc: Cutting-edge archaeological investigations reveal the alien symbols, statues, and relics left behind by long-lost civilizations steeped in mystery. Using the latest hi-tech methods, experts explain who built these wonders and why.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Last Days of the Pharaohs
programme.desc: Experts use cutting-edge technology to investigate the improbable chain of events that led the downfall of the pharaohs. What they discover could change everything we know about ancient Egypt.

programme.title: Unearthed: Lost World of Easter Island
programme.desc: The mysterious statues of Easter Island were built by one of the world's strangest and most isolated civilizations, and today, new evidence reveals why they were built and what caused Easter Island's sudden downfall.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Last Days of the Pharaohs
programme.desc: Experts use cutting-edge technology to investigate the improbable chain of events that led the downfall of the pharaohs. What they discover could change everything we know about ancient Egypt.

programme.title: Unearthed: Mysteries in the Alien Desert
programme.desc: The Nazca Lines in Peru are mysterious giant symbols; hundreds of alien looking drawings created more than 1000 years ago. Learn why their creators made vast images in the desert that only make sense from the air.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Curse of Osiris
programme.desc: A camera captures a person inexplicably bursting into flames. An ancient statue at a museum appears to come to life at night. An alien-like creature is filmed in the sewers. Eerie lights caught on camera may explain a mysterious death.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: The Doomsday Swamp
programme.desc: A high-speed police chase ends when the fugitive makes an impossible getaway. Deep in Louisiana, a swamp devours 100-foot trees, and experts worry that a nearby town could be next. Three cars are recorded mysteriously levitating at a busy intersection.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: America's Loch Ness Monster
programme.desc: A strange creature like the Loch Ness Monster is recorded in America. Experts analyze evidence of a giant scaly egg, and some wonder if it belongs to a dragon. Birds are suddenly vaporized by an invisible death ray.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Gateway To Hell
programme.desc: A fire-breathing crater burns in the middle of a desert, and some suspect it's a gateway to hell. A deadly shark is found lurking in a golf course water hazard, and experts are baffled how it got there. A giant white blob threatens a town in California.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Curse of the Monster Spider
programme.desc: A massive spider's web takes over a park, leading experts to investigate if this monstrous trap could capture a human. A tree spurts out thick red blood, and some believe it could be an undiscovered species of carnivorous plant.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Did the Big Bang Really Happen?
programme.desc: New discoveries are causing astronomers to question if the Big Bang really happened, and using the latest science, they investigate if it wasn't just the start of our universe but many mysterious multiverses.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Finding the New Earth
programme.desc: New discoveries have revealed thousands of exoplanets beyond our solar system, and some resemble earth enough that one could be a new home for humanity. But even with cutting-edge technology, finding the perfect one is the scientific challenge of the age.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Hunt for Alien Life
programme.desc: The latest discoveries suggest that we might be on the verge of discovering life beyond our planet, and scientists are investigating if earth's life began elsewhere in the universe, and whether we need to evolve to know for sure.

programme.title: Hubble: Thirty Years of Discovery
programme.desc: For thirty years, NASA's Hubble Space Telescope has discovered new alien worlds, black holes, and the age of the universe itself. NASA astronauts reveal the secret history of the life-or-death missions to keep this complex machine working.

programme.title: Hubble: Thirty Years of Discovery
programme.desc: For thirty years, NASA's Hubble Space Telescope has discovered new alien worlds, black holes, and the age of the universe itself. NASA astronauts reveal the secret history of the life-or-death missions to keep this complex machine working.

programme.title: Space Launch LIVE: America Returns to Space
programme.desc: NASA and SpaceX join forces to reach a new milestone in space exploration: the first crewed orbital mission launched from U.S. soil in almost ten years. Coverage from Kennedy Space Center goes behind the scenes to reveal history in the making.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Connecticut Horror Story
programme.desc: One summer night in 2007 comes as a nightmare for the Petit family when woken up by two strangers in their quiet, peaceful home of Cheshire, Connecticut. Suddenly this family of four finds themselves held hostage and in a fight for their lives.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Killing Field
programme.desc: The parents of a young South Carolina couple are terrified when they go missing in 2016. Detectives find a clue that leads to strange storage container in the middle of 95 acres. What's inside unlocks secrets of a monster hiding in plain sight.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Jeffrey MacDonald: The Accused
programme.desc: An army surgeon, Jeffrey MacDonald, is the lone survivor of a brutal 1970 home invasion that claims the lives of his wife and daughters. But authorities doubt his story of murderous hippies and believe MacDonald is the culprit.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Mandy Stavik: The Case No One Could Forget
programme.desc: Hear how a bakery worker's secret plan to recover DNA from a discarded Coke can helped investigators solve the cold case of a college student murdered over Thanksgiving weekend.

programme.title: Brittany Murphy: An ID Mystery
programme.desc: Drugs, disease and scandals when Hollywood superstar Brittany Murphy dies at age 32, the world is stunned. Many believe foul play must be involved. Brittany's father searches for answers as lurid allegations against other family members mount.

programme.title: Raw Terror: Left for Dead
programme.desc: Jessica Goebel is brutally stabbed in her own home and left to die near her young children. Two suspects emerge, father to her children John Hemminger and new boyfriend Richard Hanley. Jessica's sister Shannon relives the details of her sister's death.

programme.title: Body Cam: 90 Minutes
programme.desc: Police pursue a father and son, plus, an officer's life changes when he comes face-to-face with an armed suspect.

programme.title: Brittany Murphy: An ID Mystery

programme.title: Raw Terror: Left for Dead
programme.desc: Jessica Goebel is brutally stabbed in her own home and left to die near her young children. Two suspects emerge, father to her children John Hemminger and new boyfriend Richard Hanley. Jessica's sister Shannon relives the details of her sister's death.

programme.title: Body Cam: 90 Minutes
programme.desc: Police pursue a father and son, plus, an officer's life changes when he comes face-to-face with an armed suspect.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Mandy Stavik: The Case No One Could Forget
programme.desc: Hear how a bakery worker's secret plan to recover DNA from a discarded Coke can helped investigators solve the cold case of a college student murdered over Thanksgiving weekend.

programme.title: Dangerous Persuasions: He's My Master
programme.desc: Librarian Sarah Rose abandons her family and friends to go on the road with a mysterious spiritual guru 'Master David'. It soon turns into a horrific journey of brutal violence at the hands of the teacher she worshipped. It's only when she fears for her.

programme.title: Betrayed: Blood in the Water
programme.desc: Cathy Stroup is a no-nonsense Irish mom who knows what her family needs to survive. But the question is- how will she survive them?

programme.title: Betrayed: Beware the Au Pair
programme.desc: When Tara Lynn Grant, a 34-year-old mother of two goes missing, police can find no trace of her until a gruesome discovery turns the case into a statewide manhunt.

programme.title: Betrayed: Four Weddings and a Funeral
programme.desc: After four marriages, 36-year-old Carol Grannon admits she's struggled to find someone to take care of her. That's why she returned to school and landed a lucrative job. Sadly, though, one of her men will end her life just as this new chapter begins.

programme.title: Betrayed: Life and Limb
programme.desc: Jay Orbin is living the American Dream; he's a self-made millionaire with a loving family and beautiful wife. But when his headless torso is found in the desert, his cut-throat business and seemingly perfect life reveal some very dark secrets.

programme.title: Betrayed: No Escape
programme.desc: Susan Smith, a big dreamer stuck in a rural town, becomes an FBI informant to protect her kids from her jealous husband's criminal friends… but her desire to do the right thing brings hellish consequences.

programme.title: Betrayed: Pretty in Black
programme.desc: Kelly Bullwinkle is a 17-year-old desperate to find her place among the students of her Southern California high school. When a secret affair with her friend's boyfriend goes wrong, Kelly is given one final lesson in death.

programme.title: Betrayed: Deadly Crush
programme.desc: 25-year-old Corey Parker is looking for fun and sun when she moves to the beach side town of Jacksonville, Florida. But someone in her new circle of friends has murderous intent that will end her life.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Something Wasn't Right
programme.desc: Beverly Stephens knew something wasn't right with her husband, Reginald Brooks, but never thought there was a killer inside him.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Something Is Different About Robbie
programme.desc: Though Ronald Hawkins and Candace Sims knew that their son Robbie was different from an early age, they were unprepared for the violent act that Robbie would commit, a crime that shook the nation. Now they talk about it all on camera.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: One of His Women
programme.desc: To the outside world, Aswad Ayinde was a hit music video director. But to his daughter, Aziza Ayinde Kibbibi, he was a repulsive monster who did horrifying things in God's name. After years of suffering, she finally escaped to reveal the truth about him.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: I Tried to Prevent This
programme.desc: For 17 years, Kathy Swanson feared her son, Michael, would one day harm someone. For 17 years, she tried in vain to convince people that something about Michael was different until that dreadful day finally came that her worst nightmare came true.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: El Chapo: Cartel Killer
programme.desc: Joaquín Guzmán Loera AKA El Chapo is America's number one illegal drug supplier. After over a decade of searching, the DEA, Homeland Security and the U.S. marshals combine forces with the Mexican marines to take him down.

programme.title: FBI Takedowns: Terrorist in Texas
programme.desc: The FBI's Joint Terrorism Task Force in Dallas, TX goes undercover to stop a homegrown terrorist from killing thousands of Americans. To neutralize this violent jihadist, the FBI will have to build a weapon of mass destruction of its own design.

programme.title: FBI Takedowns: The Boston Bandits
programme.desc: Up against an impenetrable code of silence in one of Boston's toughest neighbourhoods, a special FBI Task Force faces one of its toughest challenges yet, taking down a crew of professional robbers who've proven they're willing to kill.

programme.title: 9/11: As We Watched

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Supersizing in St. Petersburg, Florida
programme.desc: A newly engaged couple loves their Florida lifestyle and desires to be on the water in St. Petersburg, which means they must take on a renovation project.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Makeover in Margate, New Jersey
programme.desc: Sharon hunts for a beachfront home where she and her kids can rediscover the magic of the Jersey Shore. With a tight budget and a big wish list, they hope to pull off all the renovations and create the family retreat of their dreams.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Crystal Beach, Here We Come!
programme.desc: A young couple's new vacation home in Crystal Beach, Texas, requires a full gut, including a new kitchen, new bathrooms and a master suite. As walls are opened and floors are torn up, they realize their budget might not cover everything.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Fishing for a Fixer-Upper
programme.desc: Stephanie and Virginia's wish list for a vacation home in Galveston, TX, includes an elevated deck and close proximity to fishing. They're working with a local agent to help them reel in a winner, but permit problems and unforeseen issues threaten things.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: North Carolina Renewal
programme.desc: After a recent medical scare, Nicole is ready to live life to the fullest in a home by the water in Moorehead City, NC.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Enchanted in Emerald Isle, North Carolina
programme.desc: Leslie and Kris love the crystal waters of Emerald Isle, North Carolina, and want to buy a beach property there that's big enough for their family of four. They find their perfect space, but it needs sprucing up before they can call it home.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Six Weeks For Two A-Frames
programme.desc: Chase and his team are called in to renovate two A-Frames in Sugarloaf Valley. With only six weeks to accomplish both renovations, Chase splits the team down the middle. A friendly wager allows the winning team to dress the losing team up at dinner.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: The Twister Camp
programme.desc: A couple needs help to save their mountain camp that was leveled by a tornado. With an emphasis on outdoor entertaining, Chase and the team add an open second floor and the desired finishing touches to the camp.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Veterans' Retreat
programme.desc: A man is building a retreat to help combat-injured veterans and their families adjust to their new normal. The team are tasked with turning a cottage into an ADA-compliant event center. The key feature will be a deck that can accommodate up to 40.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Oyster Farm Shack
programme.desc: Ashley Morrill and her team of builders find themselves rebuilding an old oyster shack for a working oyster farm in Edgecomb, Maine.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Puerto Rican Grilling
programme.desc: Roger is in Puerto Rico where the weather is hot, the view is smoking and the food is a fuego. It's his first time visiting Puerto Rico and he's inviting his friends along for the ride.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Fireside Hangs
programme.desc: Roger Mooking is hanging out with two chefs putting a whole new spin on rotisserie cooking in the great outdoors. At SpringHouse restaurant in Alexander City, Ala., Chef Rob McDaniel has designed a fire-fueled contraption that he and Roger use to roast.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Too Hot to Handle
programme.desc: Roger meets two talented chefs who own two spectacular outdoor cooking rigs.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Swords and Spits
programme.desc: Chef Roger Mooking visits chefs using unusual tools over live fires. In Georgia, Roger meets Erik Niel, a chef that loves to break out of his butcher shop to cook outdoors.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Fiery Fish and Fowl
programme.desc: In North Bend, Ore., Chef Roger Mooking meets up with Don Ivy, Chief of the Coquille Tribe. Roger and Don roast a school of salmon for a traditional tribal feast.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: The Salt and the Sea
programme.desc: Roger Mooking is spending the day at Jacobsen Salt Co., in Netarts Bay, Oregon, one of the largest producers of handcrafted sea salt in America. Owner Ben Jacobsen takes Roger on a tour of the facility, showing him how to smoke sea salt.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Salty and Smoky in the Windy City
programme.desc: Anthony Anderson hooks up with Michael Symon to discover some of the city's legendary food institutions for sensational smoke sausages and indulgent burgers.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Beastly Burgers
programme.desc: Michael Symon gets things started in Boston where a whole smoked hog is getting the royal treatment with a marinade injection, a salt crust and a foil wrap for crispy skin. Then in Phoenix, a wolf of a burger gets topped with smoked pulled pork.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Scary Good Smoked Meat
programme.desc: In San Diego, Michael Symon chows down on fish tacos with housemade blue corn tortillas and a meaty Mexican pizza. In Denver, a local Colorado lamb patty is a remake of a traditional Hawaiian hangover cure, the Loco Moco.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Supremely Smokey and Dizzyingly Delicious
programme.desc: Michael Symon starts in Savannah, where fried chicken and pancake tacos are a delicious reinvention of classic chicken and waffles. In Seattle, a burger with a house-made chorizo patty brings serious Spanish flavor to the Pacific Northwest.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Charlotte, North Carolina
programme.desc: Casey Webb charges into Charlotte, North Carolina, for three takes on Southern specialties. There's a cheesy chicken classic care of Korea, a time-honored institution's signature sandwich and the biggest walking taco in all the Carolinas.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Cleveland, Ohio
programme.desc: Casey Webb's food frenzy brings him to Cleveland, Ohio, for a corned beef colossus, a caramel ice cream sundae at a sweet time machine and an Olympic-sized gyro in the Greek Village Grille's Mount Olympus Challenge.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Pittsburgh, Pa
programme.desc: Casey Webb heads to Pittsburgh for creative eats and a five-pound sandwich loaded with meat, cheese, fries and coleslaw.

programme.title: Man v. Food Nation: Baltimore, MD
programme.desc: Casey Webb's epic eating expedition brings him to Baltimore for an out-of-this-world diner, a classic crab feast and a four-pound pho fight.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Salty and Smoky in the Windy City
programme.desc: Anthony Anderson hooks up with Michael Symon to discover some of the city's legendary food institutions for sensational smoke sausages and indulgent burgers.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Beastly Burgers
programme.desc: Michael Symon gets things started in Boston where a whole smoked hog is getting the royal treatment with a marinade injection, a salt crust and a foil wrap for crispy skin. Then in Phoenix, a wolf of a burger gets topped with smoked pulled pork.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Scary Good Smoked Meat
programme.desc: In San Diego, Michael Symon chows down on fish tacos with housemade blue corn tortillas and a meaty Mexican pizza. In Denver, a local Colorado lamb patty is a remake of a traditional Hawaiian hangover cure, the Loco Moco.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Supremely Smokey and Dizzyingly Delicious
programme.desc: Michael Symon starts in Savannah, where fried chicken and pancake tacos are a delicious reinvention of classic chicken and waffles. In Seattle, a burger with a house-made chorizo patty brings serious Spanish flavor to the Pacific Northwest.

programme.desc: Not all pizzas are created equal so Food Obsessed is seeking out the sauciest, cheesiest, most delicious pizza concoctions ever created. We're going to be biting into everything from the classic Neapolitan pie to pizza dripping in sugary goodness.

programme.title: Food Obsessed: Lard Have Mercy
programme.desc: Food Obsessed is diving headfirst into a giant vat of deep-fried deliciousness! We're sinking our teeth into everything from those Southern staples to freaky fair food.

programme.title: Food Obsessed: Say Cheese!
programme.desc: America's cheesiest dishes just got even cheesier and Food Obsessed is here to find them! We're piling our plates high with mounds of ooey-gooey goodness from all around the country.

programme.title: Food Obsessed: Oodles of Noodles
programme.desc: Food Obsessed is exploring the endless options for noodles! We've prepared our appetites for everything from noodles swimming in marinara sauce to noodles fried to perfection.

programme.title: Food Obsessed: Franks For The Memories
programme.desc: Food Obsessed is searching high and low for hot dogs, frankfurters and sausages that will blow your mind!

programme.title: Food Obsessed: How We Roll
programme.desc: From spring rolls and dinner rolls to rolling dough and rolling out the barrel, you won't believe what mouthwatering food is coming next.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Florida Keys
programme.desc: Casey Webb's tasty travels take him to the Florida Keys for a bad-to-the-bone shrimp burrito and Ropa Vieja at a Cuban institution. Then he grabs a fork for the largest slice of pie he's ever seen in The Fish House's Key Lime Pie Challenge.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Phoenix, AZ
programme.desc: Casey heads to Arizona to unearth the Phoenix's most appetizing eats and take on eight wings slathered in a scorching ghost chili and habanero sauce plus two whole grilled habanero peppers.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Washington, DC
programme.desc: Adam's hunger takes him to Washington, DC, to 'Horace and Dickie's' and 'Ben's Chilli Bowl'.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Minneapolis, MN
programme.desc: Casey Webb travels to Minnesota's largest city, where he tries a legendary burger that's become a regional icon, noshes on a gigantic brunch meal served with its own food Ferris wheel and takes on a massive four-pound banh mi behemoth.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Cape Town
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern leaves no meal unexplored in multicultural Cape Town, South Africa, where meat comes in all forms, from sausage to stew to pie. The coastal city's seafood is out of this world, and the favorite pastry is nothing without a coat of syrup!

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Mauritius
programme.desc: From piping-hot fried dumplings and handmade egg noodles to veggie-stuffed flatbread and curried swordfish, Andrew Zimmern showcases the flavorful fusions of the island paradise of Mauritius.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Asheville
programme.desc: Andrew reveals the iconic eats of Asheville, North Carolina. The eclectic food city features tangy barbecue, decadent sweet potato pie, mouth-watering fried chicken, succulent rainbow trout and giant soft-dough biscuits with savory gravy.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Savannah
programme.desc: Andrew dives into the flavour-packed favourites of Savannah, Georgia, like creamy shrimp and grits, briny oysters in a half shell, upscale crab bisque and down-home barbecue stew so thick it'll make your spoon stand up.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: The Upper Crust
programme.desc: The best part of any dish is what holds it all together: the crust! Chef Beau MacMillan's favorite pot pie in Phoenix, Arizona, takes on Duff Goldman's seafood pie pick in Baton Rouge, Louisiana.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: The Closers
programme.desc: There's no better way to end a meal than with these delicious dishes. In New York City, Martha Stewart gushes over the most irresistible piece of lemon meringue she's ever had.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Bay Area
programme.desc: San Francisco proves that barbeque is not strictly southern, with the pork bun at Yank Sing.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Vegas
programme.desc: Better bet it all on finding amazing food in Las Vegas as they know how to double down.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: New England

programme.title: Forensic Files: Yes, in Deed
programme.desc: Following a terrible fire in a mobile home, the medical examiner makes a startling discovery which sets off a dramatic turn of events.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Guarded Secrets

programme.title: Forensic Files: Four on the Floor
programme.desc: A Native American woman is found murdered less than 10 miles from where a male Native American was murdered two years earlier. Police begin to wonder if a serial killer is on the loose.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Freedom Fighter
programme.desc: 15 years after a murder and conviction, a letter from prison sets off a chain of events that has investigators exhuming a body and looking for evidence to find out if they convicted the real killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dog Day Afternoon
programme.desc: A woman is found dead in her Florida home, and evidence at the scene is scarce. All signs point to burglary. The case goes cold until police get a tip from a canine behaviorist who points them in a different direction.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shattered Innocence

programme.title: Crimes of the Century: The Siege at Waco
